records.m_Talk_ENG: We are the Apostles of the Promised Land who serve the prophecy of the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are the Apostles of the Promised Land who serve the prophecy of the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are the Apostles of the Promised Land who serve the prophecy of the Golden Tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the heavens split apart and darkness descends, we shall pray without faltering.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the heavens split apart and darkness descends, we shall pray without faltering.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the heavens split apart and darkness descends, we shall pray without faltering.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When angels descend upon this land and song echoes through the air, our foe shall face judgment as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When angels descend upon this land and song echoes through the air, our foe shall face judgment as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When angels descend upon this land and song echoes through the air, our foe shall face judgment as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On the day our wish is fulfilled. Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On the day our wish is fulfilled. Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On the day our wish is fulfilled. Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you... Mr. Belly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you... Mr. Belly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you... Mr. Belly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, it seems there's been a small misunderstanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, it seems there's been a small misunderstanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, it seems there's been a small misunderstanding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Veles. As the Krivi, the high priest who serves the Golden Tree, I help oversee the affairs of the city of Anapilis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Veles. As the Krivi, the high priest who serves the Golden Tree, I help oversee the affairs of the city of Anapilis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Veles. As the Krivi, the high priest who serves the Golden Tree, I help oversee the affairs of the city of Anapilis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Veles... I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Veles... I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Veles... I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I suppose no one would actually be named "Belly"... I must be a bit out of sorts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I suppose no one would actually be named "Belly"... I must be a bit out of sorts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I suppose no one would actually be named "Belly"... I must be a bit out of sorts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understandable. Clara is still adjusting to life in the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understandable. Clara is still adjusting to life in the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understandable. Clara is still adjusting to life in the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Clara... So that's the girl's name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Clara... So that's the girl's name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Clara... So that's the girl's name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not very common for outsiders to arrive here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not very common for outsiders to arrive here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not very common for outsiders to arrive here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems the will of the Golden Tree has guided you to this place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems the will of the Golden Tree has guided you to this place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems the will of the Golden Tree has guided you to this place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree... Does he mean that enormous tree?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree... Does he mean that enormous tree?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree... Does he mean that enormous tree?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen scenery like this before, and yet it somehow doesn't feel unfamiliar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen scenery like this before, and yet it somehow doesn't feel unfamiliar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen scenery like this before, and yet it somehow doesn't feel unfamiliar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where exactly is the city called Anapilis located?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where exactly is the city called Anapilis located?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where exactly is the city called Anapilis located?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anapilis is not connected to anywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anapilis is not connected to anywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anapilis is not connected to anywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which makes specifying its location rather meaningless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which makes specifying its location rather meaningless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which makes specifying its location rather meaningless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Riddles are nice and all, but could you tell me something real instead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Riddles are nice and all, but could you tell me something real instead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Riddles are nice and all, but could you tell me something real instead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I ended up relying on your kindness, but I can't stay here forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I ended up relying on your kindness, but I can't stay here forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I ended up relying on your kindness, but I can't stay here forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there some reason you must leave this place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there some reason you must leave this place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there some reason you must leave this place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remember trying to stop Thagirion...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remember trying to stop Thagirion...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember trying to stop Thagirion...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But why is everything after that so hazy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But why is everything after that so hazy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But why is everything after that so hazy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything that's happened up until now feels like... it was all just a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything that's happened up until now feels like... it was all just a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything that's happened up until now feels like... it was all just a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If facing Thagirion was real, then waking up unharmed in a bed makes no sense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If facing Thagirion was real, then waking up unharmed in a bed makes no sense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If facing Thagirion was real, then waking up unharmed in a bed makes no sense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is something wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is something wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is something wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
The blonde woman who was with me! Could she be
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
The blonde woman who was with me! Could she be
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The blonde woman who was with me! Could she be
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh dear. Your wound has reopened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh dear. Your wound has reopened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh dear. Your wound has reopened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should have warned you to be more careful since it hasn't been long since you were treated. My mistake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should have warned you to be more careful since it hasn't been long since you were treated. My mistake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should have warned you to be more careful since it hasn't been long since you were treated. My mistake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have... a wound...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have... a wound...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have... a wound...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you were involved in quite a battle before arriving here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you were involved in quite a battle before arriving here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you were involved in quite a battle before arriving here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But please, rest assured. In Anapilis, no one engages in battles they do not wish for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But please, rest assured. In Anapilis, no one engages in battles they do not wish for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But please, rest assured. In Anapilis, no one engages in battles they do not wish for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... need to go back...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... need to go back...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... need to go back...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is she all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is she all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is she all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we should move her back to her room and tend to the wound again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we should move her back to her room and tend to the wound again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we should move her back to her room and tend to the wound again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you lend a hand, Ecclesia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you lend a hand, Ecclesia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you lend a hand, Ecclesia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't... cry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't... cry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't... cry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I killed her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I killed her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I killed her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I really.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I really.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I really.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I really... killed her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I really... killed her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I really... killed her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The memories of Maestra Nequitia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The memories of Maestra Nequitia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The memories of Maestra Nequitia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her final atrocity, now intertwined with me... returns every night as a nightmare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her final atrocity, now intertwined with me... returns every night as a nightmare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her final atrocity, now intertwined with me... returns every night as a nightmare.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though it wasn't my deed, the hands that killed my mother feel as vivid as if they were my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though it wasn't my deed, the hands that killed my mother feel as vivid as if they were my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though it wasn't my deed, the hands that killed my mother feel as vivid as if they were my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once someone dies, they never come back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once someone dies, they never come back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once someone dies, they never come back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That simple premise is carved into our experience and our minds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That simple premise is carved into our experience and our minds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That simple premise is carved into our experience and our minds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because of that, murder becomes a grave sin and regret becomes meaningless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of that, murder becomes a grave sin and regret becomes meaningless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of that, murder becomes a grave sin and regret becomes meaningless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rebels' revenge, carried out in the name of their country, which ruined my mother's life...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rebels' revenge, carried out in the name of their country, which ruined my mother's life...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rebels' revenge, carried out in the name of their country, which ruined my mother's life...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And my revenge, carried out in the name of my country, which forced me to kill those wretched rebels...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And my revenge, carried out in the name of my country, which forced me to kill those wretched rebels...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And my revenge, carried out in the name of my country, which forced me to kill those wretched rebels...

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are both sins of no real difference, and regrets all the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are both sins of no real difference, and regrets all the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are both sins of no real difference, and regrets all the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Expressions like cause and effect or karma... are merely ways of dressing up that simple truth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Expressions like cause and effect or karma... are merely ways of dressing up that simple truth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Expressions like cause and effect or karma... are merely ways of dressing up that simple truth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Such an obvious truth...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Such an obvious truth...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Such an obvious truth...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do we only accept it humbly after everything is already over?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do we only accept it humbly after everything is already over?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do we only accept it humbly after everything is already over?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's impossible, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's impossible, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's impossible, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If everything could be returned to the beginning...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If everything could be returned to the beginning...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If everything could be returned to the beginning...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's that ceiling again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's that ceiling again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's that ceiling again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I came back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I came back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I came back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, my dear?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, my dear?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, my dear?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is Mom here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is Mom here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is Mom here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must have had a nightmare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must have had a nightmare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must have had a nightmare.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's all right. In this place, things like those nightmares will never happen again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's all right. In this place, things like those nightmares will never happen again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's all right. In this place, things like those nightmares will never happen again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A nightmare? Everything that happened until now... was that all...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A nightmare? Everything that happened until now... was that all...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A nightmare? Everything that happened until now... was that all...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It was a long recital.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It was a long recital.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It was a long recital.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now, set the instrument down and enjoy this quiet with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now, set the instrument down and enjoy this quiet with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now, set the instrument down and enjoy this quiet with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like I remember... Mom's embrace is warm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like I remember... Mom's embrace is warm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like I remember... Mom's embrace is warm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's a dream this real, I wouldn't mind dreaming it forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's a dream this real, I wouldn't mind dreaming it forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's a dream this real, I wouldn't mind dreaming it forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, it's not a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, it's not a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, it's not a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too many people died for me to dismiss it all as just a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too many people died for me to dismiss it all as just a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too many people died for me to dismiss it all as just a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this place, death carries no meaning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this place, death carries no meaning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this place, death carries no meaning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which is why neither revenge nor regret is necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which is why neither revenge nor regret is necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which is why neither revenge nor regret is necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can something like that really be called reality?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can something like that really be called reality?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can something like that really be called reality?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the very least, it isn't a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the very least, it isn't a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the very least, it isn't a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not a fleeting dream that leaves you with nothing once you wake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not a fleeting dream that leaves you with nothing once you wake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not a fleeting dream that leaves you with nothing once you wake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something this good... feels like a miracle someone like me, who has sinned, should never receive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something this good... feels like a miracle someone like me, who has sinned, should never receive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something this good... feels like a miracle someone like me, who has sinned, should never receive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land does not discriminate based on who you are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land does not discriminate based on who you are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land does not discriminate based on who you are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is the law of this place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is the law of this place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is the law of this place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every day is the same day here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every day is the same day here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every day is the same day here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For an afterlife, it's not nearly as harsh as I expected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For an afterlife, it's not nearly as harsh as I expected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For an afterlife, it's not nearly as harsh as I expected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought evil people would die and receive the punishment they deserved. But this place is too peaceful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought evil people would die and receive the punishment they deserved. But this place is too peaceful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought evil people would die and receive the punishment they deserved. But this place is too peaceful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not everyone can reach the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not everyone can reach the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not everyone can reach the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why we are here... Neither you, nor I, nor even god knows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why we are here... Neither you, nor I, nor even god knows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why we are here... Neither you, nor I, nor even god knows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now... all I wish is that you come to like this place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now... all I wish is that you come to like this place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now... all I wish is that you come to like this place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could I not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could I not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could I not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been reunited with my mother, whom I thought I would never see again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been reunited with my mother, whom I thought I would never see again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been reunited with my mother, whom I thought I would never see again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm here too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm here too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm here too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're happy to see me again too, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're happy to see me again too, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're happy to see me again too, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? You're...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? You're...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? You're...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Clara, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Clara, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Clara, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you can call me that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you can call me that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you can call me that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nice to see you again, Clara.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nice to see you again, Clara.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nice to see you again, Clara.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You picked so many flowers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You picked so many flowers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You picked so many flowers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're for a friend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're for a friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're for a friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you like to come with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you like to come with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you like to come with me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are the Apostles of the Promised Land who serve the prophecy of the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are the Apostles of the Promised Land who serve the prophecy of the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are the Apostles of the Promised Land who serve the prophecy of the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the heavens split apart and darkness descends, we shall pray without faltering.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the heavens split apart and darkness descends, we shall pray without faltering.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the heavens split apart and darkness descends, we shall pray without faltering.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When angels descend upon this land and song echoes through the air, our foe shall face judgment as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When angels descend upon this land and song echoes through the air, our foe shall face judgment as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When angels descend upon this land and song echoes through the air, our foe shall face judgment as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: On the day our wish is fulfilled. Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: On the day our wish is fulfilled. Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.
root.m_Talk_FRA: On the day our wish is fulfilled. Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...
root.m_Talk_DEU: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...
root.m_Talk_FRA: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you... Mr. Belly?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you... Mr. Belly?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you... Mr. Belly?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, it seems there's been a small misunderstanding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, it seems there's been a small misunderstanding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, it seems there's been a small misunderstanding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Veles. As the Krivi, the high priest who serves the Golden Tree, I help oversee the affairs of the city of Anapilis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Veles. As the Krivi, the high priest who serves the Golden Tree, I help oversee the affairs of the city of Anapilis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Veles. As the Krivi, the high priest who serves the Golden Tree, I help oversee the affairs of the city of Anapilis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Veles... I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Veles... I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Veles... I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I suppose no one would actually be named "Belly"... I must be a bit out of sorts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I suppose no one would actually be named "Belly"... I must be a bit out of sorts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I suppose no one would actually be named "Belly"... I must be a bit out of sorts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understandable. Clara is still adjusting to life in the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understandable. Clara is still adjusting to life in the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understandable. Clara is still adjusting to life in the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Clara... So that's the girl's name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Clara... So that's the girl's name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Clara... So that's the girl's name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not very common for outsiders to arrive here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not very common for outsiders to arrive here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not very common for outsiders to arrive here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems the will of the Golden Tree has guided you to this place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems the will of the Golden Tree has guided you to this place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems the will of the Golden Tree has guided you to this place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree... Does he mean that enormous tree?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree... Does he mean that enormous tree?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree... Does he mean that enormous tree?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen scenery like this before, and yet it somehow doesn't feel unfamiliar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen scenery like this before, and yet it somehow doesn't feel unfamiliar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen scenery like this before, and yet it somehow doesn't feel unfamiliar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where exactly is the city called Anapilis located?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where exactly is the city called Anapilis located?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where exactly is the city called Anapilis located?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anapilis is not connected to anywhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anapilis is not connected to anywhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anapilis is not connected to anywhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which makes specifying its location rather meaningless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which makes specifying its location rather meaningless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which makes specifying its location rather meaningless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Riddles are nice and all, but could you tell me something real instead?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Riddles are nice and all, but could you tell me something real instead?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Riddles are nice and all, but could you tell me something real instead?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I ended up relying on your kindness, but I can't stay here forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I ended up relying on your kindness, but I can't stay here forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I ended up relying on your kindness, but I can't stay here forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is there some reason you must leave this place?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is there some reason you must leave this place?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is there some reason you must leave this place?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I remember trying to stop Thagirion...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I remember trying to stop Thagirion...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I remember trying to stop Thagirion...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...But why is everything after that so hazy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...But why is everything after that so hazy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...But why is everything after that so hazy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything that's happened up until now feels like... it was all just a dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything that's happened up until now feels like... it was all just a dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything that's happened up until now feels like... it was all just a dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If facing Thagirion was real, then waking up unharmed in a bed makes no sense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If facing Thagirion was real, then waking up unharmed in a bed makes no sense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If facing Thagirion was real, then waking up unharmed in a bed makes no sense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is something wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is something wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is something wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
The blonde woman who was with me! Could she be
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
The blonde woman who was with me! Could she be
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
The blonde woman who was with me! Could she be
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh dear. Your wound has reopened.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh dear. Your wound has reopened.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh dear. Your wound has reopened.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I should have warned you to be more careful since it hasn't been long since you were treated. My mistake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I should have warned you to be more careful since it hasn't been long since you were treated. My mistake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I should have warned you to be more careful since it hasn't been long since you were treated. My mistake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have... a wound...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have... a wound...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have... a wound...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you were involved in quite a battle before arriving here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you were involved in quite a battle before arriving here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you were involved in quite a battle before arriving here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But please, rest assured. In Anapilis, no one engages in battles they do not wish for.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But please, rest assured. In Anapilis, no one engages in battles they do not wish for.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But please, rest assured. In Anapilis, no one engages in battles they do not wish for.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... need to go back...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... need to go back...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... need to go back...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is she all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is she all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is she all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But we should move her back to her room and tend to the wound again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But we should move her back to her room and tend to the wound again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But we should move her back to her room and tend to the wound again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would you lend a hand, Ecclesia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would you lend a hand, Ecclesia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would you lend a hand, Ecclesia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't... cry...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't... cry...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't... cry...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I killed her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I killed her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I killed her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I really.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I really.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I really.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I really... killed her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I really... killed her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I really... killed her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The memories of Maestra Nequitia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The memories of Maestra Nequitia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The memories of Maestra Nequitia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her final atrocity, now intertwined with me... returns every night as a nightmare.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her final atrocity, now intertwined with me... returns every night as a nightmare.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her final atrocity, now intertwined with me... returns every night as a nightmare.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even though it wasn't my deed, the hands that killed my mother feel as vivid as if they were my own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even though it wasn't my deed, the hands that killed my mother feel as vivid as if they were my own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even though it wasn't my deed, the hands that killed my mother feel as vivid as if they were my own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once someone dies, they never come back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once someone dies, they never come back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once someone dies, they never come back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That simple premise is carved into our experience and our minds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That simple premise is carved into our experience and our minds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That simple premise is carved into our experience and our minds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because of that, murder becomes a grave sin and regret becomes meaningless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because of that, murder becomes a grave sin and regret becomes meaningless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because of that, murder becomes a grave sin and regret becomes meaningless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The rebels' revenge, carried out in the name of their country, which ruined my mother's life...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The rebels' revenge, carried out in the name of their country, which ruined my mother's life...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The rebels' revenge, carried out in the name of their country, which ruined my mother's life...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And my revenge, carried out in the name of my country, which forced me to kill those wretched rebels...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And my revenge, carried out in the name of my country, which forced me to kill those wretched rebels...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And my revenge, carried out in the name of my country, which forced me to kill those wretched rebels...

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are both sins of no real difference, and regrets all the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They are both sins of no real difference, and regrets all the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They are both sins of no real difference, and regrets all the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Expressions like cause and effect or karma... are merely ways of dressing up that simple truth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Expressions like cause and effect or karma... are merely ways of dressing up that simple truth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Expressions like cause and effect or karma... are merely ways of dressing up that simple truth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Such an obvious truth...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Such an obvious truth...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Such an obvious truth...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why do we only accept it humbly after everything is already over?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why do we only accept it humbly after everything is already over?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why do we only accept it humbly after everything is already over?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's impossible, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's impossible, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's impossible, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If everything could be returned to the beginning...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If everything could be returned to the beginning...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If everything could be returned to the beginning...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's that ceiling again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's that ceiling again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's that ceiling again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I came back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I came back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I came back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, my dear?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, my dear?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, my dear?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why is Mom here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why is Mom here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why is Mom here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You must have had a nightmare.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You must have had a nightmare.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You must have had a nightmare.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's all right. In this place, things like those nightmares will never happen again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's all right. In this place, things like those nightmares will never happen again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's all right. In this place, things like those nightmares will never happen again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A nightmare? Everything that happened until now... was that all...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A nightmare? Everything that happened until now... was that all...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A nightmare? Everything that happened until now... was that all...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It was a long recital.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It was a long recital.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It was a long recital.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now, set the instrument down and enjoy this quiet with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now, set the instrument down and enjoy this quiet with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now, set the instrument down and enjoy this quiet with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like I remember... Mom's embrace is warm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like I remember... Mom's embrace is warm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like I remember... Mom's embrace is warm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's a dream this real, I wouldn't mind dreaming it forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's a dream this real, I wouldn't mind dreaming it forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's a dream this real, I wouldn't mind dreaming it forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, it's not a dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, it's not a dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, it's not a dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Too many people died for me to dismiss it all as just a dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Too many people died for me to dismiss it all as just a dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Too many people died for me to dismiss it all as just a dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this place, death carries no meaning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In this place, death carries no meaning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this place, death carries no meaning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which is why neither revenge nor regret is necessary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which is why neither revenge nor regret is necessary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which is why neither revenge nor regret is necessary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can something like that really be called reality?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can something like that really be called reality?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can something like that really be called reality?

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the very least, it isn't a dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the very least, it isn't a dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the very least, it isn't a dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not a fleeting dream that leaves you with nothing once you wake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not a fleeting dream that leaves you with nothing once you wake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not a fleeting dream that leaves you with nothing once you wake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why not?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why not?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why not?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something this good... feels like a miracle someone like me, who has sinned, should never receive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something this good... feels like a miracle someone like me, who has sinned, should never receive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something this good... feels like a miracle someone like me, who has sinned, should never receive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land does not discriminate based on who you are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land does not discriminate based on who you are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land does not discriminate based on who you are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is the law of this place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is the law of this place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is the law of this place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every day is the same day here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every day is the same day here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every day is the same day here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For an afterlife, it's not nearly as harsh as I expected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For an afterlife, it's not nearly as harsh as I expected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For an afterlife, it's not nearly as harsh as I expected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought evil people would die and receive the punishment they deserved. But this place is too peaceful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought evil people would die and receive the punishment they deserved. But this place is too peaceful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought evil people would die and receive the punishment they deserved. But this place is too peaceful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not everyone can reach the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not everyone can reach the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not everyone can reach the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But why we are here... Neither you, nor I, nor even god knows.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But why we are here... Neither you, nor I, nor even god knows.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But why we are here... Neither you, nor I, nor even god knows.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For now... all I wish is that you come to like this place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For now... all I wish is that you come to like this place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For now... all I wish is that you come to like this place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How could I not?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How could I not?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How could I not?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've been reunited with my mother, whom I thought I would never see again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've been reunited with my mother, whom I thought I would never see again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've been reunited with my mother, whom I thought I would never see again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm here too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm here too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm here too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're happy to see me again too, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're happy to see me again too, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're happy to see me again too, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? You're...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? You're...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? You're...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Clara, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Clara, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Clara, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you can call me that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you can call me that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you can call me that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's nice to see you again, Clara.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's nice to see you again, Clara.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's nice to see you again, Clara.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You picked so many flowers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You picked so many flowers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You picked so many flowers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're for a friend.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're for a friend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're for a friend.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would you like to come with me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would you like to come with me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would you like to come with me?
